title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed and pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedder inside LangChain pipelines.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding driver for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines.

title: chainlit/chainlit-ollama-starter
summary: Starter template to build a ChatGPT-like UI backed by any Ollama model in <5 minutes.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); supports multi-user, RAG, web search.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial Rust CLI for managing Ollama models and chatting from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting and embedding with Ollama models.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package to integrate local LLMs via Ollama into mobile & desktop apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, dependency injection helpers, and minimal API sample.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds an /ollama slash command to query local models privately.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfiles for over 100 quantized models.
